schema:
entity user {}

entity organization {
  relation admin @user
  relation member @user
  relation auditor @user
  permission manage = admin
  permission view = admin or member or auditor
  permission audit = auditor or admin
}

entity wallet {
  relation owner @user
  relation viewer @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission send = owner
  permission receive = owner
  permission view_balance = owner or viewer or organization.member
  permission view_transactions = owner or viewer or organization.member
  permission manage_alerts = owner or organization.admin
  permission freeze = organization.admin
  permission view = owner or viewer or organization.member
  permission execute_transfer = owner
  permission manage = organization.admin
}

entity payment {
  relation initiator @user
  relation approver @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission create = initiator or organization.member
  permission view = initiator or approver or organization.member
  permission approve = approver or organization.admin
  permission void = organization.admin
  permission refund = organization.admin
  permission execute = initiator or organization.admin
  permission export = organization.admin or organization.auditor
}

entity settlement {
  relation initiator @user
  relation approver @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission create = initiator or organization.admin
  permission approve = approver or organization.admin
  permission view = initiator or approver or organization.member
  permission void = organization.admin
  permission export = organization.admin or organization.auditor
  permission reconcile = organization.admin or organization.auditor
}

entity investigation {
  relation creator @user
  relation assignee @user
  relation reviewer @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission manage = creator or organization.admin
  permission investigate = assignee or creator or organization.admin
  permission review = reviewer or organization.admin
  permission view = creator or assignee or reviewer or organization.member
  permission escalate = assignee or reviewer or organization.admin
  permission close = reviewer or organization.admin
  permission export = organization.admin or organization.auditor
}

entity establishment {
  relation owner @user
  relation manager @user
  relation staff @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission manage = owner or organization.admin
  permission edit = owner or manager or organization.admin
  permission view = owner or manager or staff or organization.member
  permission manage_rates = owner or manager
  permission manage_bookings = owner or manager or staff
  permission view_revenue = owner or manager or organization.admin
  permission publish = owner or organization.admin
}

entity system {
  relation admin @user
  relation operator @user
  relation viewer @user
  permission manage = admin
  permission operate = admin or operator
  permission view_health = admin or operator or viewer
  permission manage_kill_switch = admin
  permission view_metrics = admin or operator or viewer
  permission manage_routes = admin
  permission view_logs = admin or operator
}

entity report {
  relation owner @user
  relation viewer @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission generate = owner or organization.admin
  permission view = owner or viewer or organization.member
  permission export = owner or organization.admin
  permission delete = organization.admin
  permission schedule = organization.admin
}

entity kyc_profile {
  relation subject @user
  relation reviewer @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission view = subject or reviewer or organization.admin
  permission submit = subject
  permission review = reviewer or organization.admin
  permission approve = organization.admin
  permission reject = organization.admin
  permission view_pii = reviewer or organization.admin
}

entity kyb_application {
  relation applicant @user
  relation reviewer @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission view = applicant or reviewer or organization.admin
  permission submit = applicant
  permission review = reviewer or organization.admin
  permission approve = organization.admin
  permission reject = organization.admin
  permission request_docs = reviewer or organization.admin
}

entity identity_profile {
  relation subject @user
  relation verifier @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission view = subject or verifier or organization.admin
  permission update = subject
  permission verify = verifier or organization.admin
  permission revoke = organization.admin
}

entity loyalty_account {
  relation owner @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission view = owner or organization.member
  permission earn = owner
  permission redeem = owner
  permission adjust = organization.admin
  permission view_history = owner or organization.admin
}

entity tax_remittance {
  relation initiator @user
  relation approver @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission create = initiator or organization.admin
  permission view = initiator or approver or organization.member
  permission approve = approver or organization.admin
  permission submit = organization.admin
  permission audit = organization.auditor or organization.admin
}

entity enaira_wallet {
  relation owner @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission view = owner or organization.admin
  permission load = organization.admin
  permission pay = owner
  permission freeze = organization.admin
  permission view_balance = owner or organization.admin
}

entity trip_plan {
  relation planner @user
  relation traveler @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission create = planner or organization.member
  permission view = planner or traveler or organization.member
  permission modify = planner or organization.admin
  permission share = planner
  permission book = traveler or planner
}

entity tipping_transaction {
  relation tipper @user
  relation recipient @user
  relation organization @organization
  permission create = tipper or organization.member
  permission view = tipper or recipient or organization.admin
  permission refund = organization.admin
}
